objective: Prove an authenticated dashboard demo can validate, capture, render, and produce deterministic evidence when a local authentication profile is ready.
audience: DemoCraft maintainers evaluating local agent reliability on protected dashboard workflows.

scenes.purpose: Open the protected dashboard route using a prevalidated local auth profile and establish the private top bar.
steps: Assert the Private dashboard heading is visible.
Establish the User menu target to prove authenticated readiness.

scenes.purpose: Show dashboard actions that should only be visible after authenticated readiness succeeds.

expectedAssertions: Private dashboard heading resolves after auth preflight.
User menu resolves from the authenticated dashboard.
Export report and Invite teammate controls resolve with semantic locators.
